params.user: The user who met the threshold

distributeCouncilRewards().details: Called monthly, splits pool equally among active members

endHeadhunterQuarter().details: Called quarterly, locks in rankings and pool amount for claims

endMerchantPeriod().details: Called monthly, merchants then claim based on their rank

returns.total: Total number of merchants in the period
Total number of referrers in the year

params.merchant: The new merchant who was referred

params.user: The new user who was referred

withdrawOperations().details: Can only be called monthly by owner (DAO), ensures transparent team funding

acceptOwnership().notice: Complete ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)

claimHeadhunterReward(uint256,uint256).notice: Claim headhunter reward for a completed quarter

claimMerchantReward(uint256).notice: Claim merchant reward for a completed period based on rank

creditMerchantReferral(address).notice: Credit merchant referral after merchant completes 3+ transactions

creditUserReferral(address).notice: Credit user referral after user has $25+ worth in vault

distributeCouncilRewards().notice: Distribute council pool evenly to active council members

endHeadhunterQuarter().notice: End the current quarter and snapshot the pool

endMerchantPeriod().notice: End merchant period and snapshot for claiming

getMerchantsPaginated(uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Get paginated list of merchants for a period

getPendingReferral(address).notice: Get pending referral status for an address

getReferrersPaginated(uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Get paginated list of referrers for a year

recordMerchantTransaction(address).notice: Record merchant transaction for this month's distribution

registerMerchantReferral(address,address.notice: Register a pending merchant referral (points awarded after 3 tx)

registerUserReferral(address,address).notice: Register a pending user referral (points awarded after $25 in vault)

setOperationsWallet(address).notice: Set operations wallet for team sustainability

withdrawOperations().notice: Withdraw operations pool to team wallet
